They advised our 17-year old, 5.5 ton was shot and needed replacement.  They also recommended for us to replace the 3.5 ton unit of the same age. They proposed 2 Daikin Kit units at a good price and added a 5% discount and 12-year warranty for the 2 units. We approved.  AA arrived at 8:30 Monday,  tore out our old units, installed the new units and had us up and running by 6pm. They left nothing behind except for cool air. The Daikin units are amazing and quiet. 5-Stars for Daikin and Air Anytime.

Richard and Brad were the installers and did a 10+ job making sure every aspect of the job was completed to both their and my satisfaction. He couldn't find anything wrong, so I had it filled and he offered to send a quote for a new system. My husband got home and asked what test did he use? Dye, electronic? I'm like, he didn't offer anything like that. So, I call back the next day and ask why a dye test wasn't offered and the representative said, dye isn't used anymore, only electronic. Why wasn't electronic offered? Well, I can send you some estimates.. I get a quote for a new York system and EasySeal Direct Inject Refrigerant Leak Sealant With Dye... Dye?? Not only did you send me a quote to use dye, after you stated only electronic leak detectors are used now, I also asked for a quote on a Trane and you send me a quote for a York.

Why would I use a $50 coupon, you sent me in the mail, to do business with you? I wasted $360 I spent on the freon. Please don't send anymore junk mail. Thanks you.

We called a few companies to see what they would charge for this size air conditioner.  One company came out and was quite expensive so I started looking at companies with the best reviews.   Thus we called air anytime to ask what it would cost.  The owner of the company came out almost immediately with a helper, but before giving the estimate looked the air conditioner over. He told us it was heating instead of cooling , did something with the wiring and it started working.   We told him about the low refrigerant and he tested it and said it was fine.  When I asked how much we owed he said that estimates were free and we didn't owe anything.   We paid him anyway grateful that we found someone honest and saved several thousand dollars.
